findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "nexbid_purchase" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: <tool_description> Initiate a purchase for a product found via nexbid_search. Returns a checkout link that the user can click to complete the purchase at the re…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "nexbid_purchase" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
